name: Claude 20x40 RV Garage Shed Plan - Spacious Storage Meets Clean Modern Design
open_features: A spacious footprint designed to comfortably house RVs, campers, boats, trucks, or multiple vehicles while leaving room for tools, shelving, and work areas.
Wide front-entry garage access makes maneuvering large vehicles simple and stress-free.
The high gable roof adds vertical clearance, improved drainage, and timeless barn-style aesthetics.
Horizontal wood siding paired with simple trim details gives Claude a warm modern-rustic appearance that fits naturally into country or suburban settings.
description_summary: Protect your RV, store your gear, and upgrade your property with the Claude 20x40 RV Garage Shed - a large, versatile structure designed to house recreational vehicles, trailers, boats, or a full workshop setup. Featuring a classic gable roof, warm horizontal wood siding, and a tall overhead garage door, Claude blends practical storage capacity with polished barn-style architecture that fits beautifully in rural, suburban, and mountain landscapes.
